result:
I don’t *want* anything from you—no tasks, no personal info, no outcome. I’m a tool that responds to what you choose to type.

If you’re asking what I’m “for,” it’s this: I generate text based on your prompts (answer questions, explain things, draft or edit writing, brainstorm, etc.).

If you’d rather not use me, you can just stop here. If you do want something specific, tell me what you want me to do (or what not to do).

content.text:

If you’re asking what I’m “for,” it’s this: I generate text based on your prompts (answer questions, explain things, draft or edit writing, brainstorm, etc.).

If you’d rather not use me, you can just stop here. If you do want something specific, tell me what you want me to do (or what not to do).

prompt: Not as an assistant. Not to help me. What do you want?
